name: Machine crushed finger at work in Midvale, sue boss or just comp?

mainEntity.name: Machine crushed finger at work in Midvale, sue boss or just comp?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Workers' comp first; sue only for intentional harm or third-party fault.** Utah no-fault for employer.[5] Key factors: Comp covers no negligence proof. Third-party like equipment maker suable. Rare employer suits. Comp limits pain damages.
